props.name: SIM\_RESOLUTION
props.description: Fluid simulation resolution for velocity fields.

props.name: CAPTURE\_RESOLUTION
props.description: Resolution used for certain capture operations (rarely changed).

props.name: DENSITY\_DISSIPATION
props.description: Rate at which color/density dissipates over time.

props.name: VELOCITY\_DISSIPATION
props.description: Rate at which velocity dissipates over time.

props.name: PRESSURE
props.description: Base pressure for the fluid simulation.

props.name: PRESSURE\_ITERATIONS
props.description: Number of Jacobi iterations used for the pressure solver.

props.name: CURL
props.description: Amount of vorticity/curl to apply for swirling effects.

props.name: SPLAT\_RADIUS
props.description: Radius of the 'splat' effect when user interacts.

props.name: SPLAT\_FORCE
props.description: Force of the fluid 'splat' on each interaction.

props.name: SHADING
props.description: Toggles simple lighting/shading on the fluid.

props.name: COLOR\_UPDATE\_SPEED
props.description: Frequency at which pointer colors are re-randomized.

props.name: BACK\_COLOR
props.description: Base background color for the fluid. Not always used if TRANSPARENT is true.

props.name: TRANSPARENT
props.description: Determines if the canvas background should be rendered with alpha.
